_comment: Burp-style match/replace applied in order as Go RE2 regex to the outgoing request wire. Use [^\r\n] (NOT .*) so a rule never eats the CRLF and corrupts header framing. JSON escapes (\r\n) become real CRLF after parsing.

rules.name: strip-if-none-match
rules._why: Remove the browser's cached ETag so the server returns a full 200 (with body) instead of a 304 Not Modified -- Splice's plugins/secret-hunt need the body.
